title: メジロ家の歩み・連年の女王

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Bright, you were incredible... This is the first time
a Mejiro has won a consecutive victory at the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I wanted to beat you to it, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Congrats. You're really a queen, no contest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's the title I wanted most for myself, but I'll
concede it this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. As Umamusume of the Mejiro family,
this is something we both must chase after.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
To be queen of the Mejiros... I wonder if I've
gotten any closer to achieving something great
like Ramonu.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Like her being the first in Umamusume history to
win the Triple Tiara...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
However, I don't believe the title "queen" really
suits me at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You think so? I think you're queenly enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Try to play the part and see. How about you do
something queenly for your fans?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hello, my fans! I would like to thank you for
giving me the title of Queen today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
To repay you for this kindness, I would like to
present a glorious gesture of thanks from the
Mejiro estate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: As Queen, I offer you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Something I shall decide upon later. Thank you
for your patience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: B-Bright?! You didn't come up with anything?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did, I just thought it would be a good
idea to ruminate on it for a while longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's kind of the same as not coming up with
anything. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Fine, fine. Let me make an offer, so all you have
to do is say yes. Got it, Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Y-yes. I will say exactly that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's in your hands now. I'm so pleased that you'll
be handling this for me, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Don't get your expectations too high. But I guess that reaction is pretty queenlike if anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Everyone underneath you has to work nonstop,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry for the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Still... I think the title of queen would suit you
better, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're not wrong. But I'm going to be queen on
my own terms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'll let you sit on the throne for now.
Until next year, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Understood. I'll leave it to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A smile of royal approbation dances on Mejiro
Bright's lips. One step ahead of Mejiro Dober,
she's inherited the Mejiro throne first.
